case_title: REYES, JOVENCIO vs. DOE, JOHN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYES, JOVENCIO AS TO DEFENDANT DOE, JOHN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-28-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-27-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-08-1993
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYES, JOVENCIO

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-28-1993, CONTINUED TO JUL-12-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR DISMISSAL. PLTF. MUST GIVE NOTICE. SANCTIONS IMPOSED AGAINST PLTF'S COUNSEL FOR $100 STAYED TO 7/12/93 IF DISMISSAL IS FILED IN WHICH CASE IT WILL BE PERMANENTLY STAYED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-12-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUL-12-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED. HEARING SET FOR SEP-10-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
